title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational initiative from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation that provides lessons, videos, worksheets, and teacher training to help educators introduce AI and machine learning to students. The program uses research-backed pedagogy and has reached educators in over 165 countries, supporting foundational AI knowledge and responsible AI ethics for school-aged students.
